items.title: NGX: Foreign investors’ participation slumps 26% to N183.61 billion in May, worst decline in 2026
items.summary:
Foreign investors' transactions declined 25.90% month-on-month to N183.61 billion from N247.78 billion in April, even as overall market activity reached its highest monthly level of the year.

items.title: NGX ETFs rally as Stanbic IBTC ETF 30 delivers 219.64% return
items.summary:
The Stanbic IBTC ETF 30 delivered a remarkable 219.64% return in the first half of 2026, leading a broadly strong performance across Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) listed on the Nigerian Exchange (NGX), with ten of the twelve tracked funds recording gains while two closed the period lower.

items.title: Nigerian gov’t launches e-cooking initiative to accelerate clean energy transition
items.summary:

items.summary:

items.title: Electricity meter installations hit 357,495 in Q1 2026, highest deployment in five quarters
items.summary:

items.summary:
